description_long: This object is a compact, matte-black firearm with a robust, angular frame and a prominent barrel. The grip is textured and ergonomically shaped, with a visible magazine base extending slightly below the handle. The slide features serrations for improved handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and generously sized for finger access. The rear of the object displays a hammer and safety lever, while the top has a simple iron sight system. The overall design is modern and tactical, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A matte-black, modern firearm with a robust frame, ergonomic grip, and prominent barrel, featuring a rounded trigger guard and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the slide.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, slide serrations, grip texture, and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hammer, rear sight, and the width of the grip and slide.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slide, grip, and safety lever details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, medium barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
